test.name: #1 Create Task

kw.name: Authorize
kw.doc: Authorize user to SMTP and IMAP servers.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
kw.msg: The chromedriver version (127.0.6533.99) detected in PATH at C:\Program Files\Autosphere\Browser\chromedriver-win64\chromedriver.exe might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (149.0.7827.201); currently, chromedriver 149.0.7827.155 is recommended for chrome 149.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Typing text 'admin' into text field '//input[@type="text" and @placeholder="Username"]'.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Typing text 'admin' into text field '//input[@type="password" and @placeholder="Password"]'.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
kw.msg: Current page contains element '//tr[td[contains(normalize-space(), 'EB_EASYPAISA_') or contains(normalize-space(), 'eb_easypaisa_') or contains(normalize-space(), 'eb_Easypaisa_')]]//input[@value='Job Status']'.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Jump To Task
kw.doc: Jump directly to given task, skipping the rest of the task execution. If run inside a teardown, also skips the rest of the teardown sequence.
kw.msg: ValueError: Task not found: Deleting Saved Screenshot

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Update Ini Value
kw.doc: All arguments must be given as strings i.e written in quotations. If given Section already exists ,then it will be updated. And if it doesnot exists,then it will be created. For Example: file_path= 'E://Abc//def.ini' section= 'CREDTS' key= 'username' value='456' Output>>> [CREDS] username = 456

kw.name: Screenshot
kw.doc: Capture page and/or element screenshot.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: TABE*B_EASYPAISA_ENG : Job Entry Is Not Found
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keywords
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Send Message
kw.arg: body="this message is sent to inform you about the bot failure"
kw.doc: Send SMTP email

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.status: ValueError: Task not found: Deleting Saved Screenshot

errors.msg: This is a deprecated import that will be removed in favor of Autosphere.Browser.Selenium

The chromedriver version (127.0.6533.99) detected in PATH at C:\Program Files\Autosphere\Browser\chromedriver-win64\chromedriver.exe might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (149.0.7827.201); currently, chromedriver 149.0.7827.155 is recommended for chrome 149.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry
Graphviz executable not found: failed to execute ['dot', '-Tsvg'], make sure the Graphviz executables are on your systems' PATH
